info.title: Suppression Groups API
info.description: Manage suppression groups and suppression entries. Suppression groups let you categorize unsubscribes, bounces, and spam complaints so that you can control which emails are sent to which contacts.

get.description: Returns all suppression groups for the current project. Optionally filter to only global groups or include global groups alongside project-specific ones.
Returns a single suppression group by its ID.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a suppression group by its ID.

post.description: Returns all suppression groups that contain the given email address.
Searches suppression entries with optional filters and pagination.
Returns all suppression entries without pagination. Useful for exporting or bulk processing.
Adds one or more email addresses to a suppression group.
Removes one or more email addresses from a suppression group.
